mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bif.tb_email_log(fromemail,toemail,subject,message,senddate,result,userid) VALUES( #{fromEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate(), #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
